mac.notes: Encrypted transfers: files, photos, screen mirroring and audio are now end-to-end encrypted. New Sync Folder mirrors a folder with your phone (a private Dropbox). Plus a fresh animated splash.

android.notes: Encrypted transfers for files, photos, screen and audio. New Sync Folder mirrors “Bifrost Sync” on your phone with a folder on the Mac — both ways. Plus a fresh animated splash.
